summary: Tested Gate Dashboard Mobile UI and Media Upload features. All 14 backend tests passed. Frontend UI verified: Mobile gate dashboard with INWARD/OUTWARD buttons, camera scanner, tracking input, media capture flow. Incoming Queue shows Media column with image counts and working media viewer modal.

minor.issue: API accepts any scan_type value (including 'invalid') without validation - should restrict to 'inward' or 'outward'

action_items: Consider adding scan_type validation in POST /api/gate/scan to only accept 'inward' or 'outward'
critical_code_review_comments: Gate media upload correctly creates folder structure: Returns/{date}-{trackingId}/images/ for inward, Dispatches/... for outward
File naming follows required format: {trackingId}_{sequence}.jpg (e.g., TRCK195508_01.jpg)
Media validation enforced: Inward requires 2+ images, Outward requires 1+ image
Mobile gate dashboard auto-detects mobile viewport and renders touch-friendly UI
Incoming Queue Media column shows image/video counts with clickable View buttons
Media viewer modal displays images with navigation, metadata, and proper styling
seed_data_creation: Test gate logs and media created with TEST/TRCK/INW/OUT prefixes during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Gate media features fully working. Mobile dashboard uses html5-qrcode for barcode scanning (requires camera access). Media uploaded to NAS via FILE_API_URL. Incoming Queue media viewer fetches media by gate_log_id or tracking_id.

features_tested.POST /api/gate/scan (inward): PASS - Creates gate log with pending status
features_tested.POST /api/gate/scan (outward): PASS - Creates gate log with pending status
features_tested.POST /api/gate/media/upload: PASS - Uploads image with correct folder structure and naming
features_tested.GET /api/gate/logs: PASS - Returns list of gate logs
features_tested.GET /api/gate/media/{gate_log_id}: PASS - Returns media list with counts
features_tested.GET /api/gate/media/by-tracking/{trackin: PASS - Returns media by tracking ID
features_tested.GET /api/incoming-queue: PASS - Returns queue entries with media fields
features_tested.Frontend - Mobile Gate Dashboard: PASS - INWARD/OUTWARD buttons, camera scanner, tracking input visible
features_tested.Frontend - Incoming Queue Media Column: PASS - Shows image counts with View buttons
features_tested.Frontend - Media Viewer Modal: PASS - Displays images with navigation and metadata
